title: Akalathe Ambili
subTitle: A wealthy man gets rich through shady deals, not caring about ethics, but his world changes when he falls for a woman who is in another relationship.

subTitle: When a judge's enemies decide to seek revenge, they harm his son and daughter. They even bring in his lookalike to further malign his image in society, who in reality turns out to be his estranged son.
